hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env$' && python3 -c 'import json; print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Reading .env files is blocked to prevent exposure of secrets."}}))' || true

jq -r '[.tool_input.path // "", .tool_input.glob // ""] | join(" ")' | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]/])\.env([[:space:]]|$)' && python3 -c 'import json; print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Reading .env files is blocked to prevent exposure of secrets."}}))' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]/])\.env([[:space:]]|$)' && python3 -c 'import json; print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Reading .env files is blocked to prevent exposure of secrets."}}))' || true
